data.title: Write structural validation test for prior-art search eval config
data.description:
RED test: verify that the promptfoo eval config for prior-art search exists with required scenario types.

File: tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-eval.sh

Add .test-index RED marker: plugins/dso/skills/shared/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml: tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-eval.sh [test_eval_config_exists]

test_eval_config_exists MUST be the first test function.

Test assertions (6 tests, metadata/schema validation):
1. test_eval_config_exists: plugins/dso/skills/shared/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml exists and is non-empty
2. test_eval_has_boundary_scenarios: config contains at least 3 test entries with boundary/search/no-search descriptions
3. test_eval_has_false_positive_exclusions: config contains test entries for routine modifications (single-file, formatting, lint)
4. test_eval_has_incident_replay: config contains at least 3 test entries referencing ACLI/bash/confident-ignorance incidents
5. test_eval_discoverable_by_runner: run-skill-evals.sh --all discovers the shared/ eval config
6. test_is_executable: test file is executable

File Impact:
- tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-eval.sh (create)
- .test-index (edit — add RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test gate exits 0 with RED-marked failures tolerated - Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] RED state confirmed - Verify: ! bash tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-eval.sh
- [ ] Test file exists and executable - Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-eval.sh
- [ ] At least 6 test functions - Verify: grep -c '^test_' tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-eval.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED marker present - Verify: grep -q 'shared/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml.*\[test_eval_config_exists\]' .test-index
